\tzpentry{ID4203}{Solar Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4203 introduces Solar Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \Psi_{\text{solar}}(r,\phi,t) &= B_0\left(\frac{r_0}{r}\right)^2 \exp\left[i\left(\phi - \Omega_{\odot}t - \frac{r-r_0}{v_{sw}}\Omega_{\odot}\right)\right] \\ &= B_0\left(\frac{r_0}{r}\right)^2 \exp[i\Phi_{\text{Parker}}(r,\phi,t)] \end{align}
